title: Rounded Sun+Moon
description: This Resource Pack Changes The Sun and Moon To Be More Circular, Whilst Keeping a Vanilla Look!
body:
Are you looking for a simple pack which changes the Sun and Moon to be more circular? Then this is the resource pack for you! This pack is designed to be as Vanilla as possible and I'm sure it won't dissapoint!


![Sun Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1167e1ea39a7f3466095be4e4a9abc9aef0d4be7.png)![Moon Phases Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8cc2ee8107a661f6b376ffb1b136c2ca8f9f23e.png)
